cards.title: Hallmarks of Ageing & Biology
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • 9 Hallmarks: Genomic instability, telomere attrition, epigenetic alterations...
  • mTOR, AMPK, sirtuins: Longevity pathways
  • Caloric restriction vs IF: Evidence comparison
  • Epigenetic clocks: Horvath, GrimAge biomarkers

cards.title: Longevity Supplements & NAD+
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • NMN/NR: NAD+ precursors 500mg–1g/day
  • Resveratrol 500mg + quercetin 500mg
  • Rapamycin: Emerging evidence, risks
  • Metformin for longevity (off-label): TAME trial
  • Senolytics: Dasatinib + quercetin protocol
